title: peucedanum bupleuroides
intro: Peucedanum bupleuroides, also known as Bupleurum chinense or Chinese Bupleurum, is a type of plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Peucedanum bupleuroides include reducing fever, relieving anxiety and depression, and protecting against liver damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or made into capsules or tablets, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
